variables.name: API_APP
variables.description: Uvicorn app import path.

variables.name: API_HOST
variables.description: API listen host.

variables.name: API_HEALTH_URL
variables.description: Health endpoint used by full_stack startup readiness checks.

variables.name: API_PORT
variables.description: API listen port.

variables.name: BILIBILI_SMOKE_URL
variables.description: Bilibili URL used by live smoke process scenario.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_DB
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL database name override.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL password override.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_PORT
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL exposed host port.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_USER
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL username override.

variables.name: CORE_REDIS_PORT
variables.description: Core services Redis exposed host port.

variables.name: CORE_TEMPORAL_PORT
variables.description: Core services Temporal frontend exposed host port.

variables.name: DEV_API_RELOAD
variables.description: Enable uvicorn --reload in dev_api; full_stack up forces this to 0 for stable background mode.

variables.name: DEV_WORKER_SHOW_HINTS
variables.description: Print environment hints before worker startup.

variables.name: FULL_STACK_REQUIRE_READER
variables.description: Require reader stack health checks during smoke.

variables.name: FULL_STACK_SMOKE_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS
variables.description: Heartbeat interval seconds for full-stack smoke long-running stages.

variables.name: INIT_ENV_FORCE
variables.description: Overwrite generated template when set to truthy.

variables.name: INSTALL_DEPS
variables.description: Whether bootstrap installs dependencies.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Live smoke API base URL override. Parent-shell value has priority over .env-loaded values.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_DIAGNOSTICS_JSON
variables.description: Diagnostics JSON output path for live smoke execution summary.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_CMD
variables.description: Optional shell command override for computer_use smoke scenario; defaults to scripts/smoke_computer_use_local.sh.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP
variables.description: Skip computer_use smoke scenario when true.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP_REASON
variables.description: Mandatory reason when LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP is enabled.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_STRICT
variables.description: Strict mode toggle for computer_use smoke scenario. When true, missing or failed command is treated as failure.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_HEALTH_PATH
variables.description: Health endpoint path used by live smoke API preflight check.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS
variables.description: Heartbeat interval seconds for live smoke polling progress logs.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_MAX_RETRIES
variables.description: Max curl retry attempts used by live smoke external probes (allowed range [1,2]).

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_EXTERNAL_PROBE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Timeout seconds for external provider probe requests in live smoke preflight.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS
variables.description: Polling interval seconds used while waiting for live smoke jobs to reach terminal status.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_REQUIRE_API
variables.description: When true, fail live smoke if API is not reachable; otherwise skip.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_REQUIRE_SECRETS
variables.description: When true, fail live smoke if required external provider secrets are missing; otherwise skip.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Timeout seconds for provider canary run in live smoke script.

variables.name: MCP_DIR
variables.description: MCP server root directory.

variables.name: MCP_ENTRY
variables.description: MCP Python entry module.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_ADMIN_PASSWORD
variables.description: Miniflux admin password.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_ADMIN_USERNAME
variables.description: Miniflux admin username.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_API_TOKEN
variables.description: Miniflux API token for AI sync.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_DB_NAME
variables.description: PostgreSQL database name for Miniflux container.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_DB_PASSWORD
variables.description: PostgreSQL password for Miniflux container.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_DB_USER
variables.description: PostgreSQL username for Miniflux container.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_PORT
variables.description: Miniflux host port exposed by docker compose.

variables.name: NEXTFLUX_PORT
variables.description: Nextflux exposed port.

variables.name: OFFLINE_FALLBACK
variables.description: Allow degraded smoke success when docker/network prevents reader stack startup.

variables.name: OPS_CANARY_INTERVAL_HOURS
variables.description: Polling interval in hours for provider canary workflow.

variables.name: OPS_CANARY_RUN_ONCE
variables.description: Run provider canary starter once when set to 1.

variables.name: OPS_CANARY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Provider canary timeout threshold in seconds.

variables.name: OPS_CANARY_WORKFLOW_ID
variables.description: Temporal workflow ID for provider canary ops starter.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_CACHE_DIR
variables.description: Optional cache directory override for cleanup workflow.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_CACHE_MAX_SIZE_MB
variables.description: Optional post-cleanup cache size cap in MB.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_CACHE_OLDER_THAN_HOURS
variables.description: Optional age threshold in hours for cleanup workflow cache files.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_HOURS
variables.description: Polling interval in hours for cleanup workflow.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_OLDER_THAN_HOURS
variables.description: Age threshold in hours for cleanup workflow target files.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_RUN_ONCE
variables.description: Run cleanup starter once when set to 1.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_WORKFLOW_ID
variables.description: Temporal workflow ID for cleanup ops starter.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_WORKSPACE_DIR
variables.description: Optional workspace directory override for cleanup workflow.

variables.name: OPS_DAILY_LOCAL_HOUR
variables.description: Local hour (0-23) for daily digest workflow schedule.

variables.name: OPS_DAILY_RUN_ONCE
variables.description: Run daily digest starter once when set to 1.

variables.name: OPS_DAILY_TIMEZONE
variables.description: IANA timezone name for daily digest scheduling.

variables.name: OPS_DAILY_TIMEZONE_OFFSET_MINUTES
variables.description: Optional timezone offset override in minutes for daily digest scheduling.

variables.name: OPS_DAILY_WORKFLOW_ID
variables.description: Temporal workflow ID for daily digest ops starter.

variables.name: OPS_DRY_RUN
variables.description: Print worker commands without execution when set to 1.

variables.name: OPS_NOTIFICATION_INTERVAL_MINUTES
variables.description: Polling interval in minutes for notification retry workflow.

variables.name: OPS_NOTIFICATION_RETRY_BATCH_LIMIT
variables.description: Maximum retry batch size for notification retry workflow.

variables.name: OPS_NOTIFICATION_RUN_ONCE
variables.description: Run notification retry starter once when set to 1.

variables.name: OPS_NOTIFICATION_WORKFLOW_ID
variables.description: Temporal workflow ID for notification retry ops starter.

variables.name: OPS_SHOW_HINTS
variables.description: Print ops workflow startup hints when set to 1.

variables.name: OUTPUT_PATH
variables.description: Generated local env template path.

variables.name: PROFILE
variables.description: Bootstrap profile local|gce.

variables.name: PR_LLM_REAL_SMOKE_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Default API base URL used by local PR real LLM smoke script.

variables.name: PR_LLM_REAL_SMOKE_DIAGNOSTICS_JSON
variables.description: Diagnostics output path for local PR real LLM smoke script.

variables.name: PR_LLM_REAL_SMOKE_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS
variables.description: Heartbeat interval seconds for local PR real LLM smoke progress logs.

variables.name: PR_LLM_REAL_SMOKE_MAX_RETRIES
variables.description: Max API retry attempts for local PR real LLM smoke requests.

variables.name: READER_ENV_FILE
variables.description: Reader stack profile env path. Default: env/profiles/reader.env.

variables.name: WEB_PORT
variables.description: Web dev server port for full stack script.

variables.name: WITH_CORE_SERVICES
variables.description: Whether bootstrap starts dockerized core services.

variables.name: WITH_READER_STACK
variables.description: Whether bootstrap starts Miniflux+Nextflux reader stack.

variables.name: WORKER_COMMAND
variables.description: Worker command for the entry module.

variables.name: WORKER_DIR
variables.description: Worker module root.

variables.name: WORKER_ENTRY
variables.description: Worker Python entry module.

variables.name: YOUTUBE_SMOKE_URL
variables.description: YouTube URL used by live smoke process scenario.
